song.title: Go
song.author: Hillsong
song.presentation: V3 C V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics:
[V3] Nothing like Your love [C] We're giving it all away, away We're giving it all to go Your way
[V1] In the Father, there is freedom There is hope in the Name that is Jesus Lay your life down, give it all now We are found in the love of the Saviour
[P] We've come alive in You Set free to show the truth Our lives will never be the same
[V2] We are sold out to Your calling Everything that we are for Your glory Take our hearts now, have it all now Let our lives shine Your light like the morning
[B] Roll back the curtains from our eyes And now we can see You Show us the way, Your truth and life We offer our lives to bring You fame We're caught in Your freedom We're caught in Your freedom
[P2] Away, away, away, away Away, away
